message: WMI-2 live resource inconsistency (field-controlled-alloc-size): the resource's extent field 'dmamove_job.ctx' is consulted inconsistently while the resource stays live (no free) — a candidate live type/extent confusion. [mechanism:field-controlled-alloc-size;indicates=WMI-2] [mem:struct=dmamove_job;field=ctx;offset=152] [oracle:assert=dmamove_job.ctx is interpreted consistently across all live consumers;assume=resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models]
